title:
PROMPT 009: Lock в†’ Unlock вЂ” Security Moment
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1920Г—1080px (16:9)
DURATION: 2.8s | LOOP: No
SVG: Padlock (3 paths: body rectangle, shackle arc, keyhole shape) вЂ” centered 960Г—540px, 100px tall
SVG SECOND STATE: Unlocked padlock (shackle rotated/lifted open)

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #1E293B (dark slate)
Lock body fill: #64748B (grey when locked)
Lock body fill: #22C55E (green when unlocked)
Shackle stroke: #94A3B8 (medium grey) в†’ #16A34A (dark green when unlocked)
Keyhole fill: #1E293B (same as background, negative space)

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Lock centered. Subtle vignette on background edges. No text. Clean icon.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (2.8s total):
0вЂ“0.3s: Lock appears вЂ” scales 0.5 в†’ 1.0 (ease-out spring). Color: grey locked state.
0.3вЂ“0.8s: Hold. Lock body has slight shimmer scan (white diagonal highlight, 2px wide, slides Lв†’R across body, opacity 0.3, ease-in-out).
0.8вЂ“1.1s: Shackle path lifts upward (top of arc translates Y: 0 в†’ -28px, ease-in then ease-out).
1.1вЂ“1.4s: Lock body transitions grey в†’ green (color morph, ease-out).
1.4вЂ“1.65s: Shackle color transitions to dark green.
1.65вЂ“1.9s: Whole lock scales 1.0 в†’ 1.12 в†’ 1.0 (success bounce).
1.9вЂ“2.3s: Green glow expands from lock (blur 0 в†’ 20px, opacity 0.5 в†’ 0, ease-out).
2.3вЂ“2.8s: Hold green unlocked state.

EASING CURVES:
- Entry spring: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
- Shackle lift: ease-in-out
- Success bounce: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
